softwareManagement._comment: aggressiveOemRemoval: when false (default), bloatware patterns tagged "tier": "broad" in bloatware-detection.json (whole-vendor wildcards like *Razer*, *ASUS*, Dell.*, HP.* that can also match software the user deliberately installed) are excluded from detection. Set true to include them.

logging._comment: consoleLevel gates on-screen output; fileLevel gates maintenance.log. Levels: DEBUG < INFO/SUCCESS < WARN < ERROR < FATAL.
